title: Capes
description: Lets you use capes from OptiFine, LabyMod and other cape mods
body:
# Capes
A Fabric and Forge mod that lets you use capes from Optifine, LabyMod, and the MinecraftCapes Mod.

## How to use it
You just install the mod and that's it! If you want to disable capes from certain mods you can do it on the configuration screen.

## Other Information
For bug reporting please proceed to the mod's GitHub repository: https://github.com/CaelTheColher/Capes

##
This mod is not affiliated with Mojang, Optifine, LabyMod, or the MinecraftCapes Mod
